text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (If only you were here...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I've had that thought countless times.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(And I know it'll keep crossing my mind. You'll always be here inside
of me, never fading.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(My senses know you. Your silent voice. Your invisible figure. Your
heartfelt emotions.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Even under this artificial sky, I feel you.)

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: "We hope to see you again. The next show will begin at..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come to a planetarium in the hopes that it'll give me something to
talk about with Admire Vega.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finding myself surprisingly interested to learn more, I figure I might as
well pick up a book at the gift shop, when...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm always here. What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Just come to see the stars?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What's this? Ayabe prompting further conversation?
choice_data_list: Yeah, thought I'd learn a little about them.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But why? Since when did you like stars?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the conversation keeps going! I can't let this opportunity go to
waste. I need to calculate my responses...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's... that supposed to mean?
choice_data_list:
I-I just wanted to know more about your
interests!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, that response was anything but calculated. I quickly course
correct.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That's what you mean. Think before you speak next time.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Anyway... just because I like stars doesn't mean you have to like them
too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I get it. You're my trainer, and you're trying to get closer to me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But... I don't need that. It's just not necessary.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'll say it again—I'm fine being alone. I don't need you to play
friendly, or comfort me, or even be nice at all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Running, winning... These duties I must bear alone. Because she... my
sister, she...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She gave her life in my stead.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So just... leave me be.
choice_data_list:
That won't stop me, you know. I'm doing this
because I want to.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Again with that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No matter what I say, that's all you give me...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going home.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're here to buy a book, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: The one in your right hand is easier to follow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Glancing at the options I was considering, she casually drops her
recommendation before walking off without another word.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (...Why can't I just draw clearer boundaries?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I should make it obvious... get angry—draw a line in the sand and
stay firmly behind it.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...If I want to race, I need a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (That's it. That's really all it is. I'm still alone, like I should be.)
